checks.message: Adapter can post GM review cards from completed skill rolls.
Adapter filters to active Skill Challenges only.
Adapter does not duplicate skill roll math.
Adapter requires GM confirmation for tracker mutations.
Canonical skill roller imports the Skill Challenge adapter.
Skill Challenge review happens after the normal holo roll card is posted.
Skill roll chat flags include enough context for review cards.
Chat interaction bridge has a Skill Challenge review button handler.
Chat interaction bridge binds Skill Challenge review buttons.
Engine supports previewing suggested roll outcomes.
Engine can accept suggested roll outcomes.
Engine can force-count a roll as success.
Engine can force-count a roll as failure.
Engine can ignore or defer a roll without changing progress.
Chat card exposes GM confirmation actions.
GM surface refreshes when chat review updates a challenge.
Phase 3.5C does not implement Skill Challenge feat hooks yet.
